executives.name: Philip Williams
executives.background: Mr. Williams has over 20 years of experience in the mining and finance industries. He was previously the CEO of Consolidated Uranium Inc. before its merger with IsoEnergy. He has held various roles in equity research and investment banking.

tenure_dates.title: President, Chief Executive Officer and Director

executives.name: Graham Long
executives.background: Mr. Long is a finance professional with experience in the mining sector, previously serving as CFO of Consolidated Uranium Inc.

executives.name: Darryl Clark
executives.background: Dr. Clark is an exploration geologist with over 25 years of experience in the mining industry, including senior roles at Cameco and Rio Tinto.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, Exploration and Strategy

executives.name: Peter Netupsky
executives.background: Mr. Netupsky has over 15 years of experience in corporate development and investment banking, previously with Agnico Eagle Mines.

executives.name: Marty Tunney
executives.background: Mr. Tunney is a mining engineer with over 20 years of experience in the resource sector, including roles at Newmont and CIBC.

board_of_directors.name: Richard Murphy
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Murphy is a geologist with over 30 years of experience in the mining industry. He is currently the President and CEO of Argonaut Gold.

board_of_directors.name: Philip Williams
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Williams is the President and CEO of IsoEnergy and former CEO of Consolidated Uranium.

board_of_directors.name: Leigh Curyer
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Curyer is the founder, President, and CEO of NexGen Energy Ltd. He has over 20 years of experience in the resources sector.

board_of_directors.name: Christopher McFadden
board_of_directors.background: Mr. McFadden is a lawyer with over 20 years of experience in the mining industry, currently serving as Chairman of NexGen Energy.

board_of_directors.name: Peter Hawley
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Hawley is a geologist with over 35 years of experience in the mining industry and is the founder of Sabina Gold & Silver Corp.
